item.title: What Happened Today #104
item.description: Your health secretary refuses to give health advice while your surgeon general nominee promotes illegal psychedelics. Meanwhile the Houston weather office has no managers and a Kansas office can't stay open 24/7 as extreme weather season begins. They're gutting Medicaid to close hospitals, dismantling the very systems meant to keep us alive. They're not breaking government by accident. They're harvesting government for its parts while we die waiting for the ambulance. Don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of https://www.govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-qatar-iran 2. https://go.govbrief.today/agency-work-g20 3. https://go.govbrief.today/rfk-medical-advice 4. https://go.govbrief.today/means-psychedelics-mushrooms 5. https://go.govbrief.today/pa-hospitals-close 6. https://go.govbrief.today/kennedy-head-start 7. https://go.govbrief.today/weather-service-hiring 8. https://go.govbrief.today/immigrants-charged-military-zone 9. https://go.govbrief.today/intel-officials-report 10. https://go.govbrief.today/bondi-sold-stock 11. https://go.govbrief.today/feds-retaliate-aba 12. https://go.govbrief.today/dugan-files-dismissal 13. https://go.govbrief.today/georgetown-scholar-released 14. https://go.govbrief.today/cant-release-prisoners 15. https://go.govbrief.today/habeas-corups-noem 16. https://go.govbrief.today/transgender-ban-unconstitutional 17. https://go.govbrief.today/prosecutor-takes-fifth 18. https://go.govbrief.today/passport-verification-down 19. https://go.govbrief.today/spacex-public-comment

item.title: How long until Google results are all A.I. and ads?
item.description: I stole the image from here: https://imgur.com/gallery/google-search-used-to-be-incredibly-helpful-FhoPzJt#/t/google_search I complained about it here and linked some Ryan George videos: https://imgur.com/gallery/as-if-llms-arent-bad-enough-why-is-everyone-trying-to-force-low-tier-ones-on-us-CJzRsn8 AlexanderGhostly shared: "You can add -AI to your search to make it not share those results." That worked for me at that time, but when I tried today, it didn't give me the A.I. Overview, but still had "People also ask" and A.I. answers. OwlFarm wrote: "Browser plugins are your friend. Remove AI preview, block ads, restore google images, restore Gulf of Mexico, etc." Luvlyquants added: "It's another way AI steals others' work. AI review leads to a decline in traffic & revenue to websites that create the content (Reuters)." Many other people said to use other search engines or include a curse word in your search. atrielienz explained that udm14.com is a pure Google search. I just tried it and it didn't have ads, a.i., other people's questions, etc. Just results. It is extremely important to strangers that I use other search engines, but as annoying as Google is, I still find better results. I'm going to keep using udm14, though! :)

item.title: My Dad Died.
item.description: He was killed on Saturday by a wrong way driver. Trooper said my dad did everything he could to avoid impact but it just was not enough. My stepmom is recovering with several broken bones and a very broken heart. (The other driver walked away from the accident - trooper said speed was very likely a factor. Still awaiting the 'black box' results) My dad just turned 70 and still had many good years to go. He was the best dad one could ask for. He was an amazing Pops, a dedicated husband, a thoughtful friend/neighbor, a reliable brother and just an overall badass. He loved the Cardinals, Led Zeppelin and hummingbirds. He was stubborn, goofy and intelligent. He had a very unique sense of humor and has left us with many great memories and stories. He loved his family and his loss is felt by many. If you can, hug your dad. Call him and tell him you love him. You never know when will be the last time you get to.
item.dc:creator: VikingWarriorPrincess

item.title: Progress pics after losing 32 pounds
item.description: I’ve lost 32 pounds since last July (down to 163 pounds, started at 195). When you lose weight this gradually, it’s easy to miss just how big the changes are, but seeing the before and after with these pics is just blowing my mind.

item.dc:creator: fallibledegenerate

item.title: Truck it. (A Trucking Mega Dump)
item.description:
I don't know what the story is behind this, but what the truck. Anyway this dump is a collection of memes about trucking, related to trucking, or just things I find funny as a Trucker.
Usually it goes the other way...
Don't be scared to drive next to Trucks. Be scared to drive next to Giant RVs.
When you're merging into the highway, the drivers on the highway aren't responsible for letting you in. Speed the fuck up to highway speed and get fucking INNNNN. Don't SLOW DOWN when you have room to get in!
Please never drive next to a truck and linger there, either. Pass, or slow down until there's room to pass. We need the space next to us to avoid hazards on the shoulder of the road like other stopped trucks, cars, law enforcement, construction, etc. We need to be able to get over to give it space.
The OG Trucker Meme
...made real!!
Heck yeah!!!
Understandable, but ya fucked up.
I wonder what would happen if you drug tested random piss bottles assholes leave laying around...
I have NO idea how the Trucker didn't notice the car getting wedged under their trailer in the first place, let alone not seeing it in their mirror the whole time.
I love when RVers do this.
Working for a big carrier be like...
I wonder how long some of them have been sitting there...
Always wanted to do this.
What can you even do in this situation besides pucker up?
Good truckerpup!
Yep. That certainly looks loose.
I haven't seen this in-person yet. I hope to one day.
Always be careful at Railroad Crossings.
I hope it poured in their open window too.
"Whoops. Whatever..."
Squeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeek.
I don't know what happened here, but four trucks just laid over in a row? Must've been wind...
Kind of interesting.
Hint: Straps.
We're legally required to take 10 hour breaks—but that doesn't mean we sleep for 10 hours...
Fly Swatters...?
"Flip-Flopper" is a derogatory term among truckers that generally means someone who doesn't really work seriously other than driving. It would be like someone wearing their house slippers to work at a steel mill. I mean—I wear flip flops, but I'm from Florida so that's an entirely different thing.
That's... TOO wide of a load....
I bet they come from the same distribution center...
Livestock Haulers are crazy because they don't have to adhere to Hours of Service.
But the GPS said...
When you're in front of a Semi-Truck, your braking distance is their braking distance—because that's where you're going to end up anyway, with a significantly shorter vehicle.
Must've been his third day.
More like when you suddenly realize you're about to reach where you're delivering to, and that means you actually have to do shit instead of chilling now.
"You truckers are too gross to use our bathroom." "Wait..." Ya, where are we supposed to go then?
Ending this on a real note...
I know you all respect Truckers far more than regular folk do, and I appreciate it.
Cat Tax! My sweet faux manx (his tail got ripped off as a kitten) waiting for me at home. He loves kisses and snuggling! I've considered taking him in the truck with me, but I think he's happier at home where he grew up. FP Update: Wow! Thank you for the amazing welcome! I'm told I get to request something now...? Check out my other post in my gallery of encountering a herd of Sheep on the road!
item.dc:creator: GnashinTires

item.title: Honestly the real bar is so low for people to connect, we just put the barriers in place ourselves
item.dc:creator: Zakiamon

item.title: A photo of my dog every day
item.description: Sorry everyone! It’s been a hectic week. Clonked out last night and totally forgot. I’m moving shortly so been packing the house up. Also trying to get panko back into the eye doctors again before we move. A few weeks ago I thought he scratched his eyelid on something as it bled. However now he has been developing these small lumps around his eyelid that eventually bust and bleed a little bit. One thing after another with the lil man. Otherwise he is still the happiest little guy. Will keep you all posted!
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: Fantastic 4th Random Dump: The First Steps Towards a Clear Phone
item.description:
Let's do this thing.
I choose you.
It's not very effective.
The power of the rising sun.
It's team building.
I am...Groot?
Slap that button.
You know what's being thought.
Does Luigi have the same problem?
Well, it's not.
Gouda luck with that.
Hello?
You would need energon.
It's heartbreaking, really.
No, because that's not what happened.
That's no cloud.
You never go full derp.
A fellow chucker, eh?
It's basic science.
You don't go to Denny's; you end up at Denny's.
A tall?
I feel attacked.
Not that there's anything wrong with that.
It's as real as you can get.
???
It's their fault, really.
Jesus took a pounding.
It's a trademark.
Not going to touch this one.
Don't tell me you don't use one.
You had one job.
What a dishpit.
Kind of dated.
Or the Dragonzord.
Just do it.
He don't care.
It's the fuzz...literally.
What was she supposed to do?
Inspiring words.
It's just common sense.
That's what it's all about.
The Force awakens.
Don't tell me what to do.
There are worse fates.
Take a journey somewhere else.
You never know.
Yummy.
That's like $200 worth.
Too Drift, Too Driftious.
Asshole.
My friend appreciated this as a drummer.
It's a matter of principle.
Splash, splash.
There will be no survivors.
Nevermore.
It can't be good for your health.
Instructions unclear.
Phone home.
The truth is right there.
Meh, I don't even bother.
Proofread!
It's super effective.
Use your words.
Again, use your words.
Because ranger implies something else.
I'm a bit jealous.
Pika?
Better than the usual visitors.
Force an unexpected reboot.
Breathtaking.
Work it.
Entitled Folder (1)
She has her dinglehopper anyway.
Lzzy tax!
Oliver tax!

item.title: The English it is much broken
item.description: From The Ink Apprentice, my webcomic about a girl and a dragon with one wing venture into the shadows of a haunted house to save a magician with no face. Repost since the last time I posted this scene was years ago, and I'm trying to promote this comic to keep it alive T_T Webtoons https://www.webtoons.com/en/canvas/the-ink-apprentice/chapter-1-the-wizards-house/viewer?title_no=613601&episode_no=1 Tapas https://tapas.io/episode/408410
item.dc:creator: wordforpotato
